description:
Start building with AWS today! https://aws.amazon.com/free/?trk=el_a134p000006gAmtAAE&trkCampaign=AWS_Free_Tier&sc_channel=el&sc_campaign=Nielsen_YouTube_Episode_to_AWS_Free_Tier&sc_outcome=Training_and_Certification&sc_geo=NAMER&sc_country=mult&all-free-tier.sort-by=item.additionalFields.SortRank&all-free-tier.sort-order=asc

Learn from Nielsen Marketing Cloud how to process 55TB of data per day while maintaining quality, performance, and cost using a fully automated serverless pipeline. 

~Filmed prior to COVID-19~
